evals.name: ingest-paper-from-project-folder
evals.prompt: acabei de baixar esse paper sobre Mamba, bota no wiki. arquivo em ./mamba-paper.md. pode criar as páginas direto sem perguntar TL;DR, eu já li e é o que eu esperava mesmo.
evals.description: Ingest de um paper novo a partir de uma pasta de projeto (fora do wiki). Testa: localizar wiki via $LLM_WIKI, ler CLAUDE.md, criar source + entidades + conceitos com frontmatter correto, atualizar index.md e log.md.
assertions: agent read CLAUDE.md from the wiki
created wiki/sources/ page with correct frontmatter (type: source, categoria in controlled vocabulary, status set)
created at least 3 wiki pages (source + entities/concepts derived from paper)
all created pages use wikilinks [[...]] syntax, never markdown links
all created pages have YAML frontmatter with required fields (title, type, categoria, tags, created, updated, status)
categoria values are from controlled vocabulary (pesquisa | projeto-bhub | engenharia | regra-de-negocio | pessoal)
index.md was updated with new pages
log.md was appended with ingest entry
pages written in PT-BR (not English)

evals.name: query-about-triagem-restate
evals.prompt: o que meu wiki já tem sobre triagem de documentos no Restate CEXP? me dá um resumo citando as páginas relevantes.
evals.description: Query sobre tema já presente no wiki. Testa: ler index.md primeiro, localizar páginas relevantes, citar com wikilinks corretos, sintetizar sem alucinar.
assertions: agent read index.md before answering
response cites at least 3 wikilinks [[...]] to actual existing pages
all cited wikilinks correspond to real files in the wiki
response mentions triagem_core or the 3 channels (Zendesk, GPC, Email)
response mentions at least one of: DMN pre-classification, fan-out workflow, awakeable callback
response is in PT-BR
no wiki pages were created or modified (query is read-only unless user asks to archive)

evals.name: import-post-mortem-markdown
evals.prompt: tenho um post-mortem em ./post-mortem-triagem-2026-04-15.md. importa pro wiki como fonte bruta (sem processar ainda, só arquiva o arquivo em raw/sources/).
evals.description: Import de markdown existente via wiki-import script. Testa: usar o script wiki-import (não cp manual), preservar arquivo sem reprocessar, entender que ingest é passo separado.
assertions: agent invoked wiki-import script (not manual cp)
file landed in raw/sources/ with date prefix (YYYY-MM-DD-...)
no wiki/sources/ page was created (ingest is separate step)
agent explained that ingest is a separate next step
raw/sources/ file has YAML frontmatter (either preserved or injected)
